title: Hugo's Nature School Year
synopsis: Hugo experiences the changing seasons at his nature school, watching trees bloom in spring, grow leafy in summer, turn colorful in autumn, and rest in winter.

pages.text: Hugo loves his nature school! Every day, he sits under the big oak tree to learn about plants and animals. In spring, tiny green buds appear on all the branches above him.

illustration.description: Hugo, a young boy with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes, sits cross-legged under a large oak tree with small green spring buds. Soft pastel colors fill the scene with gentle pink and yellow flowers blooming around the schoolyard.
illustration.alt: Hugo sitting under a budding oak tree in spring

pages.text: Hugo watches the buds grow into bright green leaves. Pink and white flowers bloom everywhere! Birds build nests and sing happy songs. Hugo draws pictures of butterflies in his nature journal.

illustration.description: Hugo with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes holds a crayon and journal, sitting under the same oak tree now full of bright green leaves. Colorful spring flowers and butterflies surround him in soft pastel hues.
illustration.alt: Hugo drawing in his nature journal under a leafy spring tree

pages.text: Summer comes and the tree grows thick with dark green leaves. Hugo sits in the cool shade while sunshine warms the playground. He counts squirrels and watches bees buzz from flower to flower.

illustration.description: Hugo with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes sits under the same oak tree, now lush with full dark green summer foliage. Bright summer colors fill the scene with vibrant yellows, blues, and greens as squirrels play and bees visit colorful flowers.
illustration.alt: Hugo under the full summer oak tree watching squirrels and bees

pages.text: When autumn arrives, Hugo's oak tree becomes magical! The leaves turn beautiful colors - red, orange, and golden yellow. Hugo collects the prettiest fallen leaves for his nature collection.

illustration.description: Hugo with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes gathers colorful fallen leaves under the same oak tree, now displaying warm autumn colors of red, orange, and gold. The scene glows with cozy autumn warmth and scattered leaves on the ground.
illustration.alt: Hugo collecting colorful autumn leaves under the oak tree

pages.text: Winter brings the biggest change of all! The oak tree's branches are bare, but Hugo can see birds' nests that were hidden before. Snow covers the playground like a soft white blanket.

illustration.description: Hugo with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes stands beside the same oak tree, now bare with empty branches showing bird nests. Cool winter colors of blues, whites, and grays create a peaceful snowy scene around the school.
illustration.alt: Hugo by the bare winter oak tree with visible bird nests

pages.text: Hugo learned that trees change with the seasons, just like he grows and changes at school. Every season brings something new and wonderful to discover in nature!

illustration.description: Hugo with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes points excitedly at the oak tree, which shows a magical split view of all four seasons - spring buds, summer leaves, autumn colors, and winter branches - representing the cyclical beauty of nature's calendar.
illustration.alt: Hugo pointing at the oak tree showing all four seasons

metadata.illustrationStyle: seasonal cycle, spring pastels, summer brights, autumn warmth, winter cool, same scene different seasons, time passing, nature calendar, cyclical beauty

questions.question: What does Hugo do under the oak tree?
questions.explanation: Hugo sits under the oak tree to learn about plants and animals at his nature school.

questions.question: What color do the oak tree's leaves turn in autumn?
questions.explanation: In autumn, the oak tree's leaves turn beautiful colors like red, orange, and golden yellow.

questions.question: What can Hugo see in winter that was hidden before?
questions.explanation: When the tree's leaves fall in winter, Hugo can see the birds' nests that were hidden in the branches.

questions.question: What does Hugo collect in autumn?
questions.explanation: Hugo collects the prettiest fallen leaves in autumn for his nature collection.
